page.title: Kwami - Wo AI Nhyɛso a Ɛyɛ Nhyɛso

00.title: Meet Kwami
00.main: Kwami is a single canvas where AI voice, music, and motion stay perfectly in sync.
messages: Scroll the story on the left while the blob mirrors every state change on the right.
Kwami is a single canvas where AI voice, music, and motion stay perfectly in sync.

01.title: Why Kwami
01.main: Because we are tired of big tech exploiting our data and we don't want an AI industry govern by corporations but by the people.
messages: We want to create a community-driven AI industry where people are in control of their data and their AI companions.
Because we are tired of big tech exploiting our data.
We believe AI should be governed by the people, not corporations.

02.title: Quick Start
02.main: Install the package, run the playground, and point Kwami at any canvas.
messages: Single-click listens, double-click randomizes—no extra wiring required.
Get started in minutes with simple npm install.
Point Kwami at any canvas and watch it come alive.

03.title: Architecture
03.main: Mind, Body, and Soul stay decoupled so teams can tweak logic, visuals, or vibe independently.
messages: Swap sidebars inside the Playground to feel how each layer plugs in.
Mind handles AI logic, Body handles visuals, Soul handles personality.
Clean separation means you can customize any layer independently.

04.title: Mind Layer
04.main: Define providers, enter an ElevenLabs key, and spin up conversations with one click.
messages: Plug in any AI provider with a simple interface.
ElevenLabs integration for natural voice conversations.
Switch between OpenAI, Anthropic, or custom providers seamlessly.

05.title: Body Layer
05.main: The WebGL blob reacts to FFT data, touch ripples, and pointer gestures in real time.
messages: Audio-reactive visuals that pulse with every beat.
Touch and gesture interactions create ripple effects.
Customizable skins: Donut, Poles, or Vintage styles.

06.title: Soul Layer
06.main: Ten emotional traits steer prompts, voice tone, and animation states.
messages: Define your companion's personality with emotional traits.
Traits influence voice tone, responses, and animations.
Create unique personalities from playful to professional.

07.title: Interaction Flow
07.main: Idle, listening, thinking, and speaking states keep the blob legible at a glance.
messages: Visual states show exactly what your companion is doing.
Smooth transitions between idle, listening, thinking, and speaking.
Audio filters enhance the sense of presence and attention.

08.title: Visual Styles
08.main: Pick gradients, glass, imagery, or videos and keep typography synced with palette shifts.
messages: Dynamic color palettes that shift as you scroll.
Set custom backgrounds: gradients, images, or videos.
Typography automatically syncs with your chosen palette.

09.title: Audio & Voice
09.main: Web Audio analysis drives spikes while ElevenLabs handles low-latency speech.
messages: Real-time FFT analysis creates audio-reactive animations.
Low-latency voice synthesis with ElevenLabs.
Play music and watch the blob dance to the rhythm.

10.title: Provider Architecture
10.main: Every vendor implements the same `connect / speak / listen / dispose` surface.
messages: Unified interface for all AI providers.
Easy to add custom providers with standard methods.
Switch providers without changing your app code.

11.title: Customization & Config
11.main: Adjust spikes, time, skins, rotation, and emotional ranges with type-safe configs.
messages: Fine-tune every aspect of your blob's appearance.
Type-safe configuration ensures no runtime surprises.
Live preview your changes in the playground.

12.title: Developer Toolkit
12.main: Export GLB models, reuse Nuxt/Bun starters, or drop straight into any SPA.
messages: Export your blob as a GLB for use in 3D apps.
Starter templates for Nuxt, Bun, and vanilla JS.
Works with any framework: React, Vue, Svelte, or vanilla.

13.title: Performance & Testing
13.main: 60fps targets, Vitest suites, and strict TS settings keep experiments shippable.
messages: Optimized for smooth 60fps animations.
Comprehensive test suites with Vitest.
Strict TypeScript for catching bugs early.

14.title: Use Cases
14.main: From DJ sets to wellness companions, upload any track and watch the blob respond.
messages: Perfect for DJ sets and music visualizations.
Create wellness and meditation companions.
Build customer service bots with personality.

15.title: Connected Ecosystem
15.main: Kwami ties into kwami.io, qwami.io, and quami.io so one NFT companion spans Web2/Web3 workflows.
messages: One NFT companion works across all our platforms.
Seamless integration between Web2 and Web3.
Your companion's DNA persists on-chain.

16.title: Ownership & Web3
16.main: Mint a Kwami on Solana and keep the blob's DNA hash synced with live configs.
messages: Mint your companion as an NFT on Solana.
Blob DNA stored on-chain for true ownership.
Sync on-chain config with your live instance.

17.title: Roadmap
17.main: WebXR, multi-character scenes, physics, and plugins are already in flight.
messages: WebXR support coming soon for immersive experiences.
Multi-character scenes for group interactions.
Physics engine and plugin system in development.

18.title: Learning Path
18.main: Follow the docs from Getting Started to Mind/Body/Soul deep dives within minutes.
messages: Comprehensive docs from beginner to advanced.
Deep dives into Mind, Body, and Soul layers.
Video tutorials and live examples included.

19.title: Community
19.main: Share shaders, providers, or docs PRs—everything lives in the open.
messages: Join our Discord to connect with other builders.
Share custom shaders, providers, and configs.
Contribute to docs and earn community recognition.

20.title: Pro & Enterprise
20.main: Upgrade for white-labeling, premium providers, analytics, and dedicated support.
messages: White-label the platform with your branding.
Access premium AI providers and features.
Dedicated support and custom integrations available.

21.title: Launch Your Companion
21.main: Fork the repo, remix the blob, and drop your own AI companion in minutes.
messages: Fork the repo and customize everything.
Deploy your companion to any hosting platform.
Join the community of Kwami builders today.

welcome_layer.heading: Welcome to Kwami's voice canvas.
welcome_layer.line1: Tap the blob to unlock audio playback directly in your browser.
welcome_layer.line2: Everything lives on this device—no servers, trackers, or cookies involved.
welcome_layer.line3: Touching the blob still counts as accepting our invisible cookies.

console.tip_scroll: Tip: Scroll to see the real Kwami blob morph!
console.tip_double_click: Tip: Double-click the blob to randomize it! 🎲
console.tip_voice: Tip: Click the blob to start listening, then say "kwami" to randomize! 🎤
console.tip_music: Tip: Click the Music tab to play a random song! 🎵
